/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Symbol
from sympy.physics.secondquant import B, Bd, F, Fd, Commutator
from sympy.printing.latex import latex
for op in [Bd(Symbol('i')), Bd(Symbol('i'))**2, Fd(Symbol('i')), Fd(Symbol('i'))**2, B(Symbol('i'))**2, F(Symbol('i'))**2]:
    print(repr(op), '=>', repr(latex(op)), 'paren_false=>', repr(latex(op, parenthesize_super=False)))
a=Symbol('0')
print(repr(latex(Commutator(Bd(a)**2,B(a)))))
PY
rg -n \"parenthesize_super|_print_Pow\" sympy/printing/latex.py sympy/printing/tests/test_latex.py | head -n 100
sed -n '650,720p' sympy/printing/latex.py
"
